ground_truth.title: The Moving Industry News by MyMovingReviews.com
ground_truth.author: Martin Panayotov
ground_truth.main_content: The latest moving industry news – latest moving technologies, business news on moving companies, publications and moving regulations. What's new in the moving and storage field. All you need to know about the latest trends. Be always up to date with the latest news and new technologies in the industry. You are welcomed to submit your moving news – see the "Contribute" page for more info. Get back regularly for up-to-date news, interviews and coverage of the latest notable events. This archive contains articles including: Protecting consumers is our priority, FMCSA Updates Transportation of Household Goods Regulations, Moving Trends and Statistics for 2021: Relocation in the Time of COVID-19 Pandemic, Moving Trends 2020: The Viral Impact of COVID-19 on the Moving Industry, Moving Home During the Coronavirus Outbreak, Moving Statistics 2019: Annual Moving Industry Infographic, GrosScherz Movers EU Revolutionizes the US Home Moving Industry, Moving Statistics 2018: Annual Moving Industry Infographic, MyMovingReviews on Acquiring MoveAdvisor, "Exciting Times for All of Us!", Moving Industry Trends 2017: Numbers Can Talk, Moving Trends 2016: Annual Moving Industry Snapshot, The U.S. Moving Industry – Challenges, Analysis and Predictions, Moving Trends: 2015 Annual Relocation Data Survey, Moving Industry Trends – Season 2014 in Numbers, 7 Mind-Blowing Stats about Moving in 2013, Moving Season 2012 Infographic – Numbers talk, Top 10 Moving Posts & Summary of 2012, The US Moving Industry Snapshot 2012, Largest Moving Companies in USA, and Why does MyMovingReviews have a Review Filter.
